name: rapp-batcave
tagline: The private workshop. Park your estate in a cubby; show the crew what you're cooking.
purpose: A standalone private workspace-neighborhood (the private-workspace pattern, extended): every member gets a cubby — isolated housing for their FULL rapp estate (agents, organs, senses, rapplications, whole neighborhoods, eggs) — the same environment as their on-device brainstem. Members stream agents from cubbies into local brainstems without grail-repo commit risk, and agents report what's new on the show-and-tell stream.

quirks.isolation: owner-only writes per cubby; append-only shared zones; cross-cubby via PR
quirks.streaming: batcave load → target brainstem agents/ + .git/info/exclude (zero commit risk)
quirks.merge_rule: (from, ts) is the universal key; append-only union

membership_policy.notes: No public join path. The operator grants access via `gh api -X PUT /repos/kody-w/rapp-batcave/collaborators/<login>` after an out-of-band conversation. Kited vTwins ride the same collaborator grant (Art. XLVII).

branch_model.main: shared truth — cubby-scoped writes + append-only zones
branch_model.personal: cubby/<handle>/<topic> — yours; never required to merge

addresses._note: No public front door — it's the batcave. Outsiders 404 (invisible). Members and kited vTwins dial the rappid at the payphone with their own GitHub auth (collaborator access = dial tone).
